scripts.check: npm run build && npm run build:tui && npm run build:nodegui
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:tui && node --test tests/rendering.test.mjs tests/bundle-loader.test.mjs tests/workspace.test.mjs tests/platform.test.mjs tests/operations.test.mjs tests/setup-runner.test.mjs tests/terminal.test.mjs tests/tui-rendering.test.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run build && sh -c 'tsc -p tsconfig.web.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput & tsc_pid=$!; trap "kill $tsc_pid 2>/dev/null" EXIT; WEBUI_DEV_RELOAD=1 node --watch --watch-path=dist/server dist/server/main.js "$@"' --
